title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: self-hosted LLM runner with a simple CLI and REST API to pull and run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc. locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama API—works in Node, Deno, Bun and browsers.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list models with a few lines of code.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain community integration to use Ollama models as LLMs or chat endpoints in chains and agents.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, dark mode, Docker one-liner).

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API and Android compatibility.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; generate, chat, pull models in idiomatic Ruby.

title: ollama-cli (go)
summary: Interactive TUI for Ollama written in Go—browse, chat, and manage models from the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-like inline assistant.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Official C# .NET client for Ollama with async streaming and nullable reference type support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset to use Ollama models in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-ts
summary: Community TypeScript wrapper around the Ollama REST API with Zod schemas and auto-generated types.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selector and PVC support.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker Compose templates for CPU and GPU (NVIDIA) setups plus Open WebUI stack.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial async Rust client for Ollama using reqwest and native-tls.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot (Streamlit)
summary: Streamlit app template for building a RAG chatbot backed by Ollama embeddings and Llama 2.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot that exposes Ollama models to Discord servers with slash commands and conversation memory.

title: ollama-npm (unofficial)
summary: Lightweight npm wrapper that downloads and manages the Ollama binary for CI/CD pipelines.

title: ollama-rust-sdk
summary: Community Rust SDK with high-level builders and low-level REST client; supports chat, generate, pull, embed.

title: ollama-huggingface
summary: Utility to convert and push Hugging Face models into the Ollama Modelfile format automatically.
